caption: A man with short dark hair and glasses is visible in a small webcam overlay in the upper right corner of a screen recording. He wears a dark shirt and looks toward the camera. The main area of the screen displays a digital document titled "Rural Community Food System." The text includes a list of points and a section stating, "You can contribute to the development of this model by adding components or by helping to finalize contents of the map." Below this, a "References" section lists links such as "Large Corporate Farm Systems," "Community Size and Mass of Farm Production," and "Rural Community Food Systems." To the right of the text is a complex diagram featuring concentric circles and green nodes connected by lines. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the overlay while the view shifts slightly, eventually showing a "Legend" at the bottom right of the document.
